title: stelis mnemonica
intro: Stelis mnemonica, also known as Antennaria alpina, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis mnemonica include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling its leaves and flowers in water to harness its medicinal properties.
